records.question: Which characters released exactly on 19-May-00 have Aladar as their hero and Kron as their villian?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT characters.movie_title FROM characters
WHERE characters.release_date = '19-May-00' AND characters.hero = 'Aladar' AND characters.villian = 'Kron'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT characters.movie_title
FROM characters
WHERE release_date = '19-May-00'
  AND hero = 'Aladar'
  AND villian = 'Kron'

records.question: Which characters have Lewis as their hero and Doris as their villian?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT characters.movie_title FROM characters
JOIN movies_total_gross ON characters.movie_title = movies_total_gross.movie_title
WHERE characters.hero = 'Lewis' AND characters.villian = 'Doris'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT characters.movie_title
FROM characters
JOIN movies_total_gross ON characters.movie_title = movies_total_gross.movie_title
WHERE characters.hero = 'Lewis' AND characters.villian = 'Doris'

records.question: What characters appear in movies released in 2002?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT characters.movie_title FROM characters
JOIN movies_total_gross ON characters.movie_title = movies_total_gross.movie_title
WHERE movies_total_gross.release_date LIKE '%2002%'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT characters.movie_title
FROM characters
JOIN movies_total_gross ON characters.movie_title = movies_total_gross.movie_title
WHERE movies_total_gross.release_date LIKE '%2002%'

records.question: Which characters appear in movies directed by Wolfgang Reitherman?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT characters.movie_title FROM characters
JOIN director ON characters.movie_title = director.name
JOIN movies_total_gross ON characters.movie_title = movies_total_gross.movie_title
WHERE director.director = 'Wolfgang Reitherman'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT characters.movie_title
FROM characters
JOIN director ON characters.movie_title = director.name
JOIN movies_total_gross ON characters.movie_title = movies_total_gross.movie_title
WHERE director.director = 'Wolfgang Reitherman'
